evals.prompt: Set up a new DribbleSpec test file for my BG3 mod and give me a minimal smoke suite.
evals.expected_output: Creates a Lua test file that uses local D = RegisterTestGlobals() and defines a passing describe/test suite.

evals.prompt: Migrate my old tests to DribbleSpec. Update to the current contract and keep behavior the same.
evals.expected_output: Rewrites test setup to use DribbleSpec APIs, RegisterTestGlobals(), describe/test/expect, fixtures, entity tests, etc.

evals.prompt: My entity test using DisplayName fails on client because of entity shape differences. Refactor to run on server.
evals.expected_output: Uses server context gating for DisplayName checks, includes context-appropriate command examples, and keeps test deterministic.

evals.prompt: Write a DribbleSpec runtime test that uses fixtures and state snapshot restore, and explain how to run only that test by tag and by name.
evals.expected_output: Provides fixture-based test with snapshot/restore, then both --tag and --name execution commands.
